hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" || exit 0; HASH_FILE=".claude/.latex-hash"; CURRENT=$(find . -name '*.tex' -o -name '*.bib' | sort | xargs shasum 2>/dev/null | shasum | awk '{print $1}'); PREV=$(cat "$HASH_FILE" 2>/dev/null); [ "$CURRENT" = "$PREV" ] && exit 0; if bash scripts/build-latex.sh > /tmp/latex-build.log 2>&1; then echo "$CURRENT" > "$HASH_FILE"; echo '{"systemMessage":"✅ LaTeX build OK: PDF を生成しました"}'; else echo '{"systemMessage":"❌ LaTeX build 失敗: /tmp/latex-build.log を確認してください"}'; fi
